ddls:
CREATE TABLE "circulation_desks" (
  "desk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circulation desk */,
  "desk_code" TEXT /* Code used to identify the desk */,
  "desk_public_name" TEXT /* Public name of the circulation desk */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member responsible for the desk */,
  "active_ind" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the desk is active */,
  "pickup_location_ind" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the desk supports pickup locations */,
  "hold_days" INTEGER /* Number of days an item can be held at the desk */,
  "solving_lag_time" INTEGER /* Time lag for solving circulation issues */,
  "print_sleep_ind" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the desk has a print sleep function */,
  "calendar_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library calendar group associated with the desk */,
  "auto_pickup_location_ind" TEXT /* Indicator of whether the desk supports automatic pickup locations */,
  "hold_format" TEXT /* Format of holds processed at the desk */,
  "hold_queue" TEXT /* Queue for managing holds at the desk */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the desk is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the desk within the library */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the desk */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the desk */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the desk */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the desk information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("desk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulation_desks_calendar_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_group_id") REFERENCES calendar_groups ("calendar_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circulation_desks_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_groups" (
  "calendar_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the calendar group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calendar group */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch associated with the calendar group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the calendar group was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the calendar group information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_groups_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the staff member works */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member's employment ended (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the staff member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holds" (
  "hold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hold */,
  "desk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circulation desk where the hold was placed */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who placed the hold */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being held */,
  "hold_date" TEXT /* Date the hold was placed */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the hold */,
  "notification_sent" TEXT /* Indicator of whether a notification was sent for the hold */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the hold was placed */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date when the hold was picked up */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Location where the hold can be picked up */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the hold (e.g., pending, picked up, expired) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the hold information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_desk_id FOREIGN KEY ("desk_id") REFERENCES circulation_desks ("desk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holds_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "patron_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "library_card_number" TEXT /* Library card number of the patron */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patron */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patron */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patron registered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the patron's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_title" TEXT /* Title of the material */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the material */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the material */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the material was published */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the material */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the material (e.g., available, on hold, checked out) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the material is located */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the material */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the material */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the material */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the material information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkouts" (
  "checkout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkout */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who checked out the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material checked out */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Date the material was checked out */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for returning the material */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the material was returned */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the checkout occurred */,
  "checkout_location" TEXT /* Location where the material was checked out */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the material has been renewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the checkout information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkouts_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who returned the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the material was returned */,
  "desk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circulation desk where the material was returned */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the return occurred */,
  "return_location" TEXT /* Location where the material was returned */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the returned material (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the return information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_desk_id FOREIGN KEY ("desk_id") REFERENCES circulation_desks ("desk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who received the notification */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., hold, checkout, overdue) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the notification was sent */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Staff member who sent the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES library_branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the library branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the library branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the library branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the library branch */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the library branch was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the library branch information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)
